title: 俺が球審だ！Sharp-Eyed Umpire Simulator
description:
Voice-Activated Umpire Action. Let your STRIKE call roar!

【Key Features】

• Unique Pitchers: Face a variety of pitchers, each featuring distinct throwing motions and a specialized arsenal of pitches.

• Massive Roster: Take on 50 different pitchers! Can you maintain a high accuracy rate over a 20-pitch challenge?

【Controls】

• Full Keyboard and Gamepad support.

【Customizable Difficulty】

• Play your way. Toggle the Strike Zone, Pitch Type, and Catcher’s Mitt displays ON/OFF to create your perfect difficulty settings.
description_short: Voice input enabled, umpire experience action. Make accurate judgments even on sharp breaking balls. Each of the multiple pitchers has their own pitching form and pitch type. Try being a home plate umpire.
